caption: The video captures a close-up rear view of a white Chevrolet Corvette parked on a concrete driveway next to a grassy area. The car's trunk or rear hatch is open, and a trailer hitch is visible at the bottom. The rear of the vehicle features red taillights and multiple logos and texts. Centered on the rear fascia is a red "CORVETTE" logo above the word "CORVETTE" in larger, silver capital letters. A Florida license plate reads "1926 WTR" with "SUNSHINE STATE" written along the bottom. As the sequence progresses, the license plate flips or rotates, changing from a white background with blue and green elements to a darker, potentially black or dark blue background, while the alphanumeric text "1926 WTR" remains the same. Small "L98" lettering is visible on the right side of the rear bumper in the later frames. No people are visible in the scene.
